products.title: Exclusive Amorette Crystal Bracelet
products.body_html:
✨ Natural Crystal Bracelet – White Phantom Quartz, Cotton Quartz & Aquamarine ✨

💗 Rose Quartz 17mm x 1 Bead
⚪️ Clear Quartz 14mm AAA Grade x 12 beads

This bracelet features a striking combination of a single large rose quartz bead with multiple pure clear quartz beads, blending elegance with harmonious energy.


🔮 Meaning & Energy:

Rose Quartz is known as the “stone of love,” enhancing emotional healing, attracting positive relationships, and boosting self-confidence. Clear Quartz amplifies these energies, balances emotions, and provides clarity and protection. Together, they create a bracelet that promotes love, harmony, and spiritual balance.


🧙🏻 Who it’s for:

Ideal for anyone seeking emotional healing, self-love, or stronger connections in their life. Perfect as a meaningful gift or personal talisman.


🔎 Product Details:

Rose Quartz: 1 bead × 17mm

Clear Quartz AAA Grade: 12 beads × 14mm

Only 1 in stock

📝 Note: Each bracelet is made from natural crystals, so slight inclusions or variations may appear – these are signs of authenticity and unique energy.
